record.field:
for rec in records: if rec.x_precise_position: if not (0 <= (rec.x_offset_right or 0) <= 250): raise UserError('Right offset (PX) must be between 0 and 250.') if not (0 <= (rec.x_offset_bottom or 0) <= 250): raise UserError('Bottom offset (PX) must be between 0 and 250.') if rec.x_custom_icon_size: if not (20 <= (rec.x_custom_icon_size_px or 50) <= 150): raise UserError('Custom icon size must be between 20 and 150 pixels.')
ICP = env['ir.config_parameter'].sudo()
ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.color_code', (rec.x_color_code or '420083').lstrip('#')) ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.style', rec.x_style or 'bottom_right') ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.precise_position', str(bool(rec.x_precise_position))) ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.icon_type', rec.x_icon_type or 'aioa-icon-type-1') ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.size', rec.x_size or 'regular') ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.icon_size_desktop', rec.x_icon_size_desktop or 'aioa-default-icon') ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.custom_icon_size', str(bool(rec.x_custom_icon_size))) ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.custom_icon_size_px',str(rec.x_custom_icon_size_px or 50)) ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.offset_right', str(rec.x_offset_right or 20)) ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.offset_right_dir', rec.x_offset_right_dir or 'to_the_left') ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.offset_bottom', str(rec.x_offset_bottom or 20)) ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.offset_bottom_dir', rec.x_offset_bottom_dir or 'to_the_bottom') # Always last — signals frontend that all values are ready ICP.set_param('odoo-allinoneaccessibility.settings_updated', 'True')
